page.title: Pricing
page.subtitle: What every green lot is worth. Reserve coffees on their own merit, commodity lots against the C

card.priceUnknown: Price waiting on a C mark

empty.title: No green lots to price yet

composer.cogsUnknownLine: Cost not booked, so margin shows as unknown

commodity.noMark: No C mark entered yet. Type the morning close to quote.

reserve.overrideHint: Leave blank to take the modeled price

accept.title: Accept this quote?
accept.body: Accepting reserves {kg} kg of {lot} for this buyer.
accept.irreversible: This commits green inventory. The next buyer sees the lower number right away.
